description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Lease and Finance Management product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Lease Authoring).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Lease and Finance Management.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized update, insert or delete access to some of Oracle Lease and Finance Management accessible data as well as  unauthorized read access to a subset of Oracle Lease and Finance Management accessible data and unauthorized ability to cause a partial denial of service (partial DOS) of Oracle Lease and Finance Management. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 6.3 (Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L).
